name: engineering-board
description: Autonomous engineering board: multi-agent build system over docs/boards/ markdown. Passive finding-extractor captures per-turn scratch; PM pipeline (consolidator + tidier + learnings-curator) promotes verified findings to the live board and Learning entries (L###); Worker pipeline (tdd-builder + code-reviewer + validator) drives a tdd->review->validate needs: state machine with atomic claim locking. v0.2.3 adds active-workers registry + PM-fallback heartbeat. v0.3.0 adds the Learning entity, /board-migrate (with rollback), and SessionStart top-learnings surface.
